$comment: Schema for app keybinding corpus files. Each file describes every known keybinding for one application, tagged by usage frequency so the keymap optimizer can weight shortcut accessibility.

fields.id: Unique app identifier (matches coach workflow id where applicable)
fields.name: Human-readable app name
fields.version: App version these keybindings were documented from
fields.category.name: Category label (e.g. 'Navigation', 'Editing')
fields.shortcut.frequency: Usage tier: 'constant' (multiple times per minute), 'high' (many times per hour), 'medium' (several times per session), 'low' (occasionally), 'rare' (setup/config only)
fields.shortcut.modifiers: Parsed modifier array for optimizer matching: ['Ctrl'], ['Ctrl','Shift'], etc.
fields.shortcut.context: When this shortcut is relevant: 'always', 'text-editing', 'mouse-browsing', 'file-management', etc.
fields.shortcut.charybdis_layer: Which Charybdis layer provides this shortcut, if mapped (null if not directly mapped)
